extortion.description: CONCEPTNET GmbH is a leading media agency located in Regensburg, specializing in cross-media marketing solutions. They develop creative concepts for web, app, print, and event media, providing tailored solutions based on modern technologies since 1996.We will upload 50gb of corporate data soon. Employee personal information (passports, IDs, addresses, emails and so on), financials, lots of projects, NDAs, etc.
